prose:
**Furan Fukui reactivity — computed result.**

**Method/provenance:** Fukui indices from finite-difference Mulliken charges using DFT **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (chemkit tier `standard`, explicit `--functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp`), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz`; no geometry optimization was requested or reported by this task. Backend reported as `program: dft`; Mulliken charges were reported as **Mulliken (PySCF)**. Density fitting was not requested. Parent neutral singlet; cation state charge +1 multiplicity 2; anion state charge −1 multiplicity 2.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = **atom 5 (C)** with **f+ = 1.9242931**. The same atom was also reported as the most nucleophilic site, **atom 5 (C)** with **f− = 0.1616371**.

| 1 | O | -1.3316182 | 0.08382155 | -0.62389834 | -1.4154398 |

| 9 | H | -0.76674059 | 0.10479266 | -0.33097397 | -0.87153325 |
